pageSubtitle: Manage and monitor all queues across your clusters
noServerDescription: Add a RabbitMQ server connection to view and manage queues across your clusters.
selectServerPrompt: Please select a RabbitMQ server to view queues
queueNotFoundDesc: Please select a server and queue to view details.
notFoundMessage: The queue "{{queueName}}" could not be found.
deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the queue "{{queueName}}"? This action cannot be undone and will permanently remove the queue and all its messages.
noQueuesOnServer: No queues found on this server
createNewQueueDesc: Create a new RabbitMQ queue with optional binding to an exchange.
autoDeleteDesc: (Queue is deleted when last consumer unsubscribes)
exclusiveDesc: (Queue can only be used by one connection)
bindingAlert: The queue will be bound to exchange "{{exchange}}"
maxLengthDesc: Maximum number of messages in queue
messageTtlDesc: Time messages live in queue before expiring (seconds, converted to ms internally)
tooltipMaxLength: Maximum number of messages the queue can hold
tooltipMessageTtl: Time in seconds that messages live in the queue before expiring (converted to milliseconds for RabbitMQ)
tooltipExpires: Time in milliseconds after which the queue expires if unused
tooltipMaxPriority: Maximum priority level for messages in this queue (0-255)
tooltipOverflow: Behavior when queue reaches max length: "drop-head", "reject-publish", or "reject-publish-dlx"
tooltipDeadLetterExchange: Exchange to route dead lettered messages to
tooltipDeadLetterRoutingKey: Routing key to use when dead lettering messages
tooltipSingleActiveConsumer: Ensure only one consumer is active at a time for ordered message processing
purge.title: Purge Queue "{{queueName}}"?
purge.description: You are about to permanently delete all messages from the queue:
purge.allMessagesDeleted: All {{count}} messages in this queue will be permanently deleted.
purge.allMessagesDeletedEmpty: All messages in this queue will be permanently deleted.
purge.clearReadyAndUnacked: Clear both ready and unacknowledged messages
purge.resetCount: Reset the queue message count to zero
purge.note: Queue purging is an asynchronous operation. The message count may take a few moments to update in the interface after the purge is initiated.
purge.successDescription: All messages in queue "{{queueName}}" have been purged
toast.createError: An error occurred while creating the queue.
toast.alreadyExistsDesc: A queue named "{{name}}" already exists. Please choose a different name.
toast.exchangeNotFoundDesc: The exchange "{{exchange}}" does not exist. Please select a valid exchange or create it first.
toast.serverErrorDesc: The selected RabbitMQ server was not found or you don't have access to it.
spyDescription: Messages flowing through this queue will appear here in real-time.
spyNoBindings: This queue receives messages only via the default exchange, which cannot be observed without consuming.
